items.title: Started Adaptive PDE Solver for Option Pricing project
items.content: Building a numerical option pricing engine solving the Black-Scholes PDE using finite difference methods.

items.title: Software Engineer Intern at Adwealth
items.content: Architected and deployed a full-scale nonprofit web application from scratch.

items.title: Vertex Instruments Website
items.description: Designed and developed a premium platform for Vertex Instruments, a startup specializing in AI-enhanced STEM tools. Built with a modern tech stack including React, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, the project focuses on high-end UI/UX design, featuring product tiering, pricing modules, and a responsive single-page architecture.

items.title: Automated Code Smell Prioritization and Ranking
items.description: Developed an intelligent system to prioritize 'code smells' by analyzing development history and 'revealed preference,' helping developers focus on critical technical debt rather than false alarms. Used scientifically rigorous ranking to reflect real-world priorities based on issues actually fixed in the past.

items.title: Adaptive PDE Solver for Option Pricing
items.description: Built a numerical option pricing engine solving the Black-Scholes PDE using finite difference methods, benchmarking results against the analytical Black-Scholes solution. Implemented both a fixed-grid solver and an adaptive time-stepping solver that dynamically refines the temporal grid near expiration to improve accuracy and computational efficiency.

items.title: Algorithmic Trading Backtester
items.description: Built a modular Python algorithmic trading backtester with separate components for data, strategies, execution, risk, portfolio tracking, and analytics. Added realistic trading frictions and controls, including slippage models, fees, latency simulation, stop-loss/take-profit, drawdown scaling, and Kelly-style sizing.

items.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering

items.title: Software Engineer Intern
items.description: Architected and deployed a full-scale nonprofit web application from scratch using modern CMS frameworks. Engineered responsive UI/UX components with custom CSS/JavaScript, optimizing cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness.

items.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
items.description: Set up a hybrid research workflow integrating Google Drive, GitHub, and Google Colab to enable efficient large-scale code analysis. Conducting metric extraction on Java projects, analyzing commits, LOC, and file structure.

items.title: Full-Stack Developer
items.description: Developed and deployed responsive, SEO-optimized websites leveraging modern frameworks and modular architecture. Led end-to-end development of client websites using modern web technologies.
